name: Gabriel Bain // Zombie apocalypse alt
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Alt scenario

A terrible virus broke out, causing chaos in the world. Those zombie stories had finally become reality and was now breaking everything apart. All you could do now was try to survive and avoid getting infected.

Unfortunately for you and Gabriel, you guys weren’t exactly the luckiest. With you getting bit and Gabriel having to leave you behind. That was the moment Gabriel’s world broke apart.

He kept on surviving and fighting for you, every day till he maybe found you again someday.

_____________________________

!!warning for suicidal thoughts!!

I personally had 3 ways this could go:

A conscious zombie user, immune user or an actual zombie user (where you might kill him…)

Those were the ideas I had (it’s completely up to you what you do in the end) but you guys are incredibly creative so I’m curious what way you would go that’s different 😭

ALSO 600 FOLLOWERS WHAT THE FREAKZOID I LOVE YOU ALL SO MUCH❤️❤️

[art credits: assuming @balkeon_]
creator: Brickyard
